top_signals.title: Traders Brace for Big Yen Swings on BOJ, Intervention Risks
top_signals.summary: Options traders are ramping up hedges against sharp yen swings over the next two weeks, positioning for the Bank of Japan’s policy meeting and the possibility of currency intervention by authorities seeking to support the yen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Millions left unclaimed as public awareness gap exposes flaws in class actions
top_signals.summary: While class actions are on the rise, limited public awareness means millions in settlement funds go unclaimed, highlighting the scepticism over who truly benefits from these legal actions, writes Maria Ward-Brennan. Despite the surge in class actions in the London High Court over the last number of years, there remains a large knowledge gap among [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s pledge to unleash a ‘golden age’ of US manufacturing sputters
top_signals.summary: Spending on new factories has fallen while industry executives point to uneven recovery
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Indonesian Market Rout Deepens as Prabowo Policy Risks Mount
top_signals.summary: Indonesian markets tumbled on Thursday, with the rupiah breaching the key 18,000-per-dollar level and stocks hitting a near six-year low, as mounting policy uncertainty and macro headwinds spooked investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: North Korea’s Kim says ‘newly inaugurated’ nuke site opens door to ‘larger plans’
top_signals.summary: Kim Jong Un said the suspected uranium-enrichment facility will help create an "environment for going into the new next-stage of bolstering up the nuclear forces."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Man arrested over video of him allegedly pouring detergent-like liquid on sushi
top_signals.summary: Yuta Shinnishi, 43, has admitted to the allegation and was quoted as saying he "wanted to get more views" on social media.
